/home/runner/work/Open1722/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/acf-can-listener.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/acf-can-listener.dir/acf-can-listener.c.o" "CMakeFiles/acf-can-listener.dir/__/acf-can-common.c.o" -o acf-can-listener  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/Open1722/Open1722/_codeql_build_dir/src: ../../../src/libopen1722.so.0.1.0 ../../libopen1722examples.a
